response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering credentials with staff-level roles, large-scale infrastructure experience, and a proven track record of shipping products, they fall significantly short on the core minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ experience. The resume shows only ~6 months of documented C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015) plus undergraduate thesis work, whereas the bulk of recent experience spans JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and other languages. Additionally, there is no clear evidence of 2+ years of formal technical leadership specifically in cloud or DevOps contexts, though teaching and mentoring interest are present.
strengths: Currently at Staff Engineer level at Stripe, demonstrating ability to operate at required seniority with recent high-impact role
Extensive track record shipping production systems at scale, including Dunnhumby's infrastructure handling millions of requests/second and Shopify's Direct Mail platform
Strong software craftsmanship culture builder—organized refactoring dojos, created multiple educational workshops, and built testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Critical gap in C++ expertise: only ~6 months documented C++ work at National Instruments, far below the 8-year minimum requirement; recent focus on JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang
No formal 2+ year technical leadership role in cloud or DevOps engineering; recent Stripe role is too new (~1 year) to evaluate leadership impact on this trajectory
Career shows breadth across many domains and languages rather than focused depth in cloud compute platform architecture and C++-heavy infrastructure systems

key_factors.factor: Staff-level current role and shipping track record
